svg.title: Redisson Feature Map
svg.desc: Redisson Feature Map. A catalogue of Redisson features grouped into 5 sections: Data Structures, Concurrency & Messaging, Distributed Services, Integrations & APIs, Deployment & Operations. 15 features are marked PRO, meaning they are available only in Redisson PRO. 12 features are marked with a red lightning bolt, meaning they offer a PRO local cache for up to 45 times faster reads. 1 features are marked with a slate lightning bolt, meaning a local cache is available in the free version. 13 features are marked with a red 3-by-3 grid icon, meaning a single structure can be partitioned across cluster nodes (a PRO feature). The Redisson PRO engine also accelerates all features by up to 4 times through faster command request and response handling.

g.text: = Single structure partitioned across cluster nodes (PRO only)

g.aria-label: Data Structures. Collections: Map (local cache in free version, PRO data partitioning), MapCache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), Multimap, Set (PRO data partitioning), SortedSet, ScoredSortedSet, LexSortedSet, List, Array, Time Series, Vector Set, JSON Store (PRO only, PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), BitVector Store (PRO only).

Data Structures. Objects: Object holder, Binary stream holder,
, Geospatial holder, RateLimiter,
, JSON object holder, BitSet (PRO data partitioning),
, GCRA Rate Limiter.
Data Structures. Queues: Queue, Deque, Priority Queue, Priority Deque, Stream, Ring Buffer, Transfer Queue.
Data Structures. Counters: Id generator, AtomicLong, AtomicDouble, LongAdder, DoubleAdder.
Data Structures. Probabilistic structures: Bloom filter (PRO data partitioning), Cuckoo filter, HyperLogLog, TopK, TDigest.
Concurrency & Messaging. Locks & Synchronizers: Lock, Fair Lock, MultiLock, ReadWriteLock, Semaphore, CountDownLatch, Spin Lock, Fenced Lock.
Concurrency & Messaging. Messaging: Pub/Sub topic, Sharded Pub/Sub topic, JMS API (PRO only), Reliable Queue (PRO only), Reliable Pub/Sub (PRO only).
Distributed Services. Services: Remote service, Live Object service (PRO local cache), Executor service, Scheduled executor service, MapReduce service, RediSearch API.

Integrations & APIs. Spring Framework: Spring Boot Starter, Spring Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), Spring Session (PRO local cache), Spring Transaction Manager, Spring Data Redis, Spring Cloud Stream (PRO only), Spring AI Vector Store (PRO only).

Integrations & APIs. Cache API Implementations: Spring Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), JCache API (JSR-107) (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), Hibernate Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), MyBatis Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), Quarkus Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning), Micronaut Cache (PRO local cache, PRO data partitioning).
Integrations & APIs. Microservices: Helidon, Micronaut, Quarkus.
Integrations & APIs. Programming APIs: Reactive Streams API, RxJava3 API, Asynchronous API.
Integrations & APIs. Web Session Management: Apache Tomcat Session, Spring Session (PRO local cache), Micronaut Session.
Integrations & APIs. Transactions & Batching: Transactions API, XA Transactions (PRO only), Pipelining.
Deployment & Operations. Valkey & Redis Deployments: Single, Sentinel, Cluster, Replicated, Proxy (PRO only), Advanced Replicated (PRO only), Multi Cluster (PRO only), Multi Sentinel (PRO only).
Deployment & Operations. Engine: Valkey commands, Redis commands, Lock-free core, High performance (PRO only).
Deployment & Operations. Security & Monitoring: Passwords encryption (PRO only), Observability (PRO only).
